title: Lament for the Destruction of Ur
description: One of the oldest pieces of literature: a city mourns its destruction and begs the gods for mercy.
introduction: One of the oldest pieces of literature: a city mourns its destruction and begs the gods for mercy.

translation.original_text: u₄ me ḫuš an-ta ed₃-de₃ ki gu₃ ĝar-ra
translation.text: When the fierce storm descended from heaven and the earth trembled at its cry.
